Project.NAME: n0wss
Project.keywords: wss, websocket, secure-websocket, proxy, socks5, internet-access, iroh, sendme, nat-traversal, backpressure, graceful-shutdown, fast-fail, metrics, adapter-contract, task-tracker, burst-detection
Project.annotation: n0wss is a secure proxy service based on the sendme/iroh ecosystem. The approved v1 architecture exposes a local SOCKS5 endpoint, normalizes requests into ProxyIntent work items, resolves either iroh or WSS transport behind minimal stream and adapter contracts, and treats fallback, shutdown, timing, accurate reply mapping, task-scoped cleanup, and burst observability as first-class design concerns.

M-CLI.NAME: CliApp
M-CLI.purpose: Bootstrap the process, choose runtime mode, and coordinate graceful shutdown phases.

fn-run.PURPOSE: Parse startup arguments and launch the selected mode.

fn-coordinateShutdown.PURPOSE: Stop accepts, drain work, and release transports in order.

type-ApplicationRunResult.PURPOSE: Represent final startup or shutdown outcomes.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Load runtime configuration, TLS paths, auth material, queue limits, session limits, timeout policy, retry behavior, and burst thresholds.

fn-loadConfig.PURPOSE: Load and validate CLI arguments and environment configuration.

type-AppConfig.PURPOSE: Typed runtime configuration for client and server modes.

export-config.PURPOSE: Expose validated immutable configuration to the rest of the application.

M-OBS.NAME: Observability
M-OBS.purpose: Initialize tracing, stable logging fields, metrics, sliding-window burst detection, and peak-rate diagnostics.

fn-initObservability.PURPOSE: Install tracing, counters, gauges, histograms, and field propagation behavior.

fn-recordBurst.PURPOSE: Record queue rejection timestamps into a sliding-window burst detector.

fn-resetPeak.PURPOSE: Reset peak-rate gauges on the configured maintenance interval.

type-ProxyMetricsHandle.PURPOSE: Holds counters, gauges, and histograms for proxy observability.

M-AUTH.NAME: AuthPolicy
M-AUTH.purpose: Apply connection authentication, token or ticket validation, and secret redaction policy.

fn-validateHandshake.PURPOSE: Authorize an incoming or outgoing tunnel handshake.

fn-redactSecret.PURPOSE: Normalize sensitive values before logs or errors are emitted.

M-TLS.NAME: TlsContext
M-TLS.purpose: Load and expose TLS server and client contexts used by the WSS boundary.

fn-fromConfig.PURPOSE: Load certificate and key material into a deterministic TLS context.

fn-accept.PURPOSE: Wrap a server-side TCP stream in TLS.

fn-connect.PURPOSE: Wrap a client-side TCP stream in TLS with SNI.

type-TlsContextHandle.PURPOSE: Typed holder for TLS materials and runtime context.

M-WSS-GATEWAY.NAME: WssGateway
M-WSS-GATEWAY.purpose: Compose TCP, TLS, websocket upgrade, and auth validation into WSS-backed transport streams under a shared adapter contract.

fn-runServer.PURPOSE: Start the WSS listener and wrap accepted sessions into transport streams.

fn-openStream.PURPOSE: Establish an outbound WSS-backed transport stream.

fn-taskTracker.PURPOSE: Expose adapter-scoped task tracking for tests and shutdown.

type-ResolvedStream.PURPOSE: Represents a transport-agnostic resolved stream plus transport kind metadata.

M-IROH-ADAPTER.NAME: IrohAdapter
M-IROH-ADAPTER.purpose: Integrate with iroh/sendme transport primitives for direct or relay-backed stream creation under a shared adapter contract.

fn-openStream.PURPOSE: Open a direct or relay-backed transport stream to the remote peer.

fn-taskTracker.PURPOSE: Expose adapter-scoped task tracking for tests and shutdown.

fn-release.PURPOSE: Release iroh transport resources for a finished session.

type-TransportKind.PURPOSE: Identify Wss, IrohDirect, or IrohRelay for metrics and diagnostics.

M-SESSION.NAME: SessionManager
M-SESSION.purpose: Coordinate session registry, transport selection, pure lifecycle transitions, and stable top-level effect routing without becoming a transport or storage implementation.

fn-registerSession.PURPOSE: Create and track a new proxy session through the registry.

fn-resolveStream.PURPOSE: Choose iroh first and fall back to WSS sequentially.

fn-handleEvent.PURPOSE: Interpret pure state effects and dispatch them.

fn-shutdown.PURPOSE: Drain registry and close sessions during shutdown.

type-SessionEffect.PURPOSE: Route pure state-machine outputs to registry, timer, or metric targets.

type-SessionHandle.PURPOSE: Provide cloneable access to one registry-owned session record.

type-SessionRecord.PURPOSE: Store mutable state, idle timestamps, and new-stream admission flags per session.

type-SessionState.PURPOSE: Represent Active, Closing, and Closed states.

type-SessionRegistry.PURPOSE: Concurrent map and semaphore for session storage and capacity control.

type-TransportSelector.PURPOSE: Sequential transport selection strategy with timeout and fallback policy.

type-TransportSelectError.PURPOSE: Describe cancellation, safety-timeout, or combined iroh and WSS resolution failures.

type-EffectHandler.PURPOSE: Stable top-level dispatcher for typed SessionEffect values.

type-RegistryCommand.PURPOSE: Local registry command enum with bounded variant count enforced by module tests.

M-SOCKS5.NAME: Socks5Proxy
M-SOCKS5.purpose: Expose a local SOCKS5 ingress surface, normalize requests into ProxyIntent work items, and emit accurate client-visible reply codes on pre-pump failures.

fn-runListener.PURPOSE: Bind and accept local SOCKS5 connections.

fn-parseRequest.PURPOSE: Parse SOCKS5 negotiation and CONNECT requests into a normalized ProxyIntent.

fn-mapReply.PURPOSE: Map ProxyError variants to exact SOCKS5 reply codes or no-reply post-pump outcomes.

type-ProxyIntent.PURPOSE: Represents a validated local proxy request ready for queueing and tunnel forwarding.

type-ErrorCategory.PURPOSE: Infrastructure, policy, target, or post-reply classification used for exhaustive reply mapping.

M-PROXY-BRIDGE.NAME: ProxyBridge
M-PROXY-BRIDGE.purpose: Consume ProxyIntent items, ask SessionManager for a generic stream, and relay bytes until completion or drain.

fn-runWorker.PURPOSE: Consume bounded ProxyIntent queue items and process them.

fn-pumpBidirectional.PURPOSE: Move bytes between local proxy sockets and resolved transport streams.

fn-drainAll.PURPOSE: Drain active proxy streams during shutdown.

type-ProxyResult.PURPOSE: Represents successful completion or failure of a proxied request.

CrossLink.relation: initializes tracing and metrics before runtime services
provides redaction-aware logging and metrics policy
supplies TLS material paths and timeout policy
uses TLS context for websocket security
exports adapter cleanup evidence and task-tracker observability
exports adapter cleanup evidence and task-tracker observability
uses WSS as fallback transport source
requests resolved streams and notifies lifecycle completion
